core_claim: Single-logical-Pauli entropy/relative-entropy/recovery response plus commutator tests determine finite stabilizer/OA-QEC observer-algebra signatures without directly supplying L_R^perp.

harlow_facing_interpretation: Weak observer shadows fail for k>1, but finite operational probes can complete the observer-algebra signature: single logical perturbation response identifies visible logical probes, and commutator tests recover the symplectic type of the visible algebra.
